Package org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.editpage

Interface IEditComposite

All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractEditComposite, CComboEditComposite, TextEditComposite, ToggleEditComposite
public interface IEditComposite

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    createComposite(IEventBEditor<?> editor, org.eclipse.ui.forms.widgets.FormToolkit toolkit, org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Composite parent)
    Create the actual widgets.
    void
    edit(int charStart, int charEnd)
    Edit the attribute given the start and end positions.
    IAttributeType
    getAttributeType()
    Return the corresponding attribute type for this edit composite.
    void
    refresh(boolean refreshMarker)
    Refresh the information display within this edit composite.
    void
    refresh(Set<IAttributeType> set)
    Refresh the information display within this edit with the information that an attribute has been changed.
    void
    setElement(IInternalElement element)
    Set the corresponding element for the edit composite.
    void
    setForm(org.eclipse.ui.forms.widgets.ScrolledForm form)
    Set the scrolled form of the main edit page.
    void
    setSelected(boolean selected)
    Select/Deselect the attribute.

  • Method Details

    • refresh

      void refresh(boolean refreshMarker)
      Refresh the information display within this edit composite.

    • setSelected

      void setSelected(boolean selected)
      Select/Deselect the attribute.
      Parameters:
      selected - true to select. false to deselect.

    • createComposite

      void createComposite(IEventBEditor<?> editor, org.eclipse.ui.forms.widgets.FormToolkit toolkit, org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Composite parent)
      Create the actual widgets. This should be called after setElement(IInternalElement) and setForm(ScrolledForm) has been called.
      Parameters:
      editor - the Event-B Editor
      toolkit - the form toolkit used to create the widgets.
      parent - the composite parent of all the widgets.

    • setElement

      void setElement(IInternalElement element)
      Set the corresponding element for the edit composite. This should be call after the constructor of any class implements this interface.
      Parameters:
      element - an attributed element

    • setForm

      void setForm(org.eclipse.ui.forms.widgets.ScrolledForm form)
      Set the scrolled form of the main edit page. This should be called after the constructor for any class implements this interface.
      Parameters:
      form - a scrolled form

    • getAttributeType

      IAttributeType getAttributeType()
      Return the corresponding attribute type for this edit composite.
      Returns:
      the corresponding attribute type IAttributeType.

    • edit

      void edit(int charStart, int charEnd)
      Edit the attribute given the start and end positions.
      Parameters:
      charStart - start position.
      charEnd - end position.

    • refresh

      void refresh(Set<IAttributeType> set)
      Refresh the information display within this edit with the information that an attribute has been changed.
